LanguageData.AutoDrill.label: auto drill
LanguageData.AutoDrill.description: An old-generation deep-crust auto drill designed for long-term unmanned operation. It continuously mines underground veins based on ground-penetrating scanner results and ejects processed ore directly. Because its legacy drilling algorithm cannot precisely strip fine mineral veins, unattended operation suffers significant material loss. If no deep vein is available, it will extract stone chunks instead. Can be repositioned freely.
